Home › Work with Us
Work with Us
We're hiring!

The crew here at Attic Books is looking for a new member. If you don’t know about us, Attic Books is a large second-hand bookstore run by a team of friendly, reliable, kind and hardworking people, located at the heart of London, Ontario in the Downtown core.

The position would be part time (2-3 days per week), with the possibility of more days depending on schedules. One shift will be for a Saturday, the other days can be more flexible. Currently we are open Monday to Saturday, 10 am-5 pm. We offer a workplace that has reciprocal respect and loyalty, an intellectually stimulating work environment, predictable schedule and of course, access to great books.

Wage: minimum wage to start ($17.60/hour). 


The job mainly entails:

Customer service and cash
Pricing, sorting and shelving books (…correctly- this is where a love of/experience with books comes in handy, although it’s not necessary)
General cleaning and grunt work (i.e. lifting and moving boxes of books)
Qualities that we are looking for in an employee:

Quick learner with a great memory and good organizational skills- this is probably THE biggest asset for this position
Capable and comfortable with both taking direction and working as a team. We are a small but mighty team of book clerks because we work well togeth
